products.name: VN-210
products.descriptor: Tactical-grade ruggedized GNSS/INS with multi-band L1/L2/E1/E5b receiver

evidence.snippet:
GNSS / INS
VN-210
======

### VN-210
The VN-210 is a tactical-grade, high-performance GNSS-Aided Inertial Navigation System (GNSS/INS) incorporating the latest inertial sensor and GNSS technology. The VN-210 combines a 3-axis accelerometer, a 3-axis gyro, a 3-axis magnetometer, and a Multi-band GNSS receiver into a compact ruggedized package to deliver a high-accuracy position, velocity, and attitude solution.

products.name: VN-210E
products.descriptor: Tactical-grade GNSS/INS embedded module for SWaP-C-constrained applications

evidence.snippet:
VN-210E
For SWaP-C Constraints

The VN-210E is a tactical-grade, high-performance GNSS-Aided Inertial Navigation System (GNSS/INS) incorporating the latest inertial sensor and GNSS technology. The VN-210E combines a 3-axis accelerometer, a 3-axis gyro, a 3-axis magnetometer, and a Multi-band GNSS receiver into a compact embedded module to deliver a high-accuracy position, velocity, and attitude solution.

products.name: VN-310
products.descriptor: Tactical-grade ruggedized dual-antenna GNSS/INS with multi-band L1/L2/E5b receivers

evidence.snippet:
DUAL GNSS / INS
VN-310
======

### VN-310
The VN-310 is a tactical-grade, high-performance Dual Antenna GNSS-Aided Inertial Navigation System. Incorporating the latest inertial sensor and GNSS technology, the VN-310 combines 3-axis accelerometers, 3-axis gyros, 3-axis magnetometers and two Multi-band L1/L2/E1/E5b GNSS receivers into ruggedized packaging to deliver a high-accuracy position, velocity, and attitude solution under both static and dynamic conditions.

products.name: VN-310E
products.descriptor: Tactical-grade dual-antenna GNSS/INS embedded module for SWaP-constrained applications

evidence.snippet:
VN-310E
For SWaP Constraints

The VN-310E is a tactical-grade, high-performance Dual Antenna GNSS-Aided Inertial Navigation System. Incorporating the latest inertial sensor and GNSS technology, the VN-310E combines 3-axis accelerometers, 3-axis gyros, 3-axis magnetometers and two high-performance GNSS receivers into a compact embedded module to deliver a high-accuracy position, velocity, and attitude solution under both static and dynamic conditions.
### Multi-band GNSS

products.name: VectorNav SDK
products.descriptor: Multi-language (C++, C#, MATLAB, .NET, Python) sensor interface SDK

evidence.snippet:
### VectorNav SDK
With the new VectorNav SDK, seamlessly interface with VectorNav's IMU and INS products using the latest C++, C#, MATLAB, .NET, and Python (64-bit) libraries. Optimized for faster configuration and communication with our sensors
[DOWNLOAD](/resources/sdk)
